1: Whose Whose sin is is covered.
2: And in whose spirit there is there is no guile.
3: Through my roaring all the day long.
4: My moisture is turned into the drought of summer. Selah. Selah.
5: And thou forgavest the iniquity of my sin. Selah. Selah.
6: Surely in the floods of great waters they shall not come nigh unto him.
7: Thou shalt compass me about with songs of deliverance. Selah. Selah.
8: I will guide thee with mine eye.
9: Whose mouth must be held in with bit and bridle, lest they come near unto thee.
10: But he that trusteth in the LORD LORD , mercy shall compass him about.
11: And shout for joy, all ye that are ye that are upright in heart.
